song.title: Oh, Come All Ye Faithful
song.author: John F. Wade
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C V4 C
song.lyrics:
[V1] . G D G D G C G D Oh, come all ye faithful, joyful and triumphant! .Em A D G D AsusD Come ye, oh, come ye to Bethlehem .Bm Am G Am D G D B7 Em A D Come and behold Him born the king of angels
[C] . G D G A G Oh, come let us adore Him . D G D D Oh, come let us adore Him .G7 C Am D7 Em Am Oh, come let us adore Him .G/D D7 G Christ the Lord!
[V2] True God of true God, light of light eternal, Our lowly nature He hath not abhorred Son of the Father begotten not created
[V3] Sing, choirs of angels, sing in exultation, Sing, all ye citizens of heaven above! Glory to God in the highest.
[V4] Yea, Lord we greet Thee, born this happy morning. Jesus, to Thee be glory giv’n! Word of the Father now in flesh appearing.
